summary: UI Unification testing completed. All 7 product pages (RetailPro, UniTxt, Expenses, Loyalty, Inventory, KwikPay, Invoicing) verified using shared WebSidebarLayout component with themed headers and consistent dashboard layouts.

integration_issues.issue: Session occasionally expires when navigating directly to product URLs requiring re-login. This was observed during testing but navigations within an active session work correctly.

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 7 products verified with WebSidebarLayout integration. Each product displays correct themed header, white sidebar, and consistent ProductDashboard. Session issue is a known limitation from previous testing - not a blocker.

ui_consistency_checks.themed_header: All products display header with product-specific background color and white text
ui_consistency_checks.product_title: Each product shows correct title in header (RetailPro, UniTxt, Expenses, Loyalty, Inventory, KwikPay, Invoicing)
ui_consistency_checks.white_sidebar: All products use white sidebar background with product-themed accent colors for active items
ui_consistency_checks.dashboard_layout: Consistent ProductDashboard component with hero cards, stats, charts, transactions list across all products

mocked_apis.note: TransactionList component uses hardcoded mock data for demonstration purposes
